Configuration files for the cc2564x target in the NimBLE system, including BLE transport and host RPA resolver settings.


## Files
- **[pkg.yml](pkg.yml.md)**: Configuration file for the cc2564x target in the NimBLE system configuration.
- **[syscfg.yml](syscfg.yml.md)**: Configuration settings for BLE transport and host RPA resolver for cc2564x target.
- **[target.yml](target.yml.md)**: Configuration for the cc2564x target, specifying app, BSP, and build profile settings.
